PartNumberMismatch.Description: Part Number programmed in ESP module does not match Broadcast

ModuleFaults.Description: DTCs recorded in the ESP Module

LeftFrontESPBuildFail.Description: Left Front Brake Force Build not sufficient

RightFrontESPBuildFail.Description: Right Front Brake Force Build not sufficient

LeftRearESPBuildFail.Description: Left Rear Brake Force Build not sufficient

RightRearESPBuildFail.Description: Right Rear Brake Force Build not sufficient

LeftFrontESPReductionFail.Description: Left Front Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

RightFrontESPReductionFail.Description: Right Front Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

LeftRearESPReductionFail.Description: Left Rear Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

RightRearESPReductionFail.Description: Right Rear Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

LeftFrontSensorFail.Description: Left Front wheel speed sensor failure

RightFrontSensorFail.Description: Right Front wheel speed sensor failure

LeftRearSensorFail.Description: Left Rear wheel speed sensor failure

RightRearSensorFail.Description: Right Rear wheel speed sensor failure

LeftFrontForceFault.Description: Left Front Brake Force Not Sufficient or Too High

RightFrontForceFault.Description: Right Front Brake Force Not Sufficient or Too High

LeftRearForceFault.Description: Left Rear Brake Force Not Sufficient or Too High

RightRearForceFault.Description: Right Rear Brake Force Not Sufficient or Too High

FaultVINCommError.Description: Failed to program VIN to ESP module

VINMismatch.Description: VIN from ESP module does not match Broadcast

PerformanceTypeError.Description: Performance Type Incorrect or Not Learned

LeftFrontABSReductionFail.Description: Left Front Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

RightFrontABSReductionFail.Description: Right Front Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

LeftRearABSReductionFail.Description: Left Rear Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

RightRearABSReductionFail.Description: Right Rear Brake Force Reduction not sufficient

LeftFrontABSRecoveryFail.Description: Left Front Brake Force Recovery not sufficient

RightFrontABSRecoveryFail.Description: Right Front Brake Force Recovery not sufficient

LeftRearABSRecoveryFail.Description: Left Rear Brake Force Recovery not sufficient

RightRearABSRecoveryFail.Description: Right Rear Brake Force Recovery not sufficient

ModuleFault_C44986.Description: Invalid Data Received From Gateway C: chassis type invalid value

ModuleFault_C44981.Description: Invalid Data Received From Gateway C: Data Length Code, Checksum or Parity invalid (GTW_CarConfig)

ModuleFault_C44881.Description: Invalid Data Received From Gateway B: Data Length Code, Checksum or Parity invalid

ModuleFault_C44781.Description: Invalid Data Received From Gateway A: Data Length Code, Checksum or Parity invalid

ModuleFault_B02800.Description: Vehicle Communication Bus A: General Fault

ModuleFault_530068.Description: Roller Bench Mode: Control Event Log

ModuleFault_522081.Description: Invalid Data Received From Gateway (VIN-Message): Data Length Code, Checksum or Parity invalid

ModuleFault_522062.Description: VIN: Received VIN does not match stored VIN

ModuleFault_521062.Description: Reverse Gear Switch: Plausibility against second signal failed
